Ox: “I want more. I have always been self-critical. I know when I am feeling good. That come out in performance. I can feel when I am in a good spell. I hate games which pass me by, especially in this team.” #awlfc [telegraph]

Ox: “When I am in midfield I know my role and job so when I feel I do not do enough - running with the ball, creating, shooting - I recognise it. That is where self criticism comes from. I wanted more from myself a lot of last season.”

Ox: “In my first season, just before I was injured, I felt I was at my best when I was breaking the lines, making opportunities for the boys. That was where I was adding something. That is what I want to do more consistently. There are things I know I can do.”

Ox on last season: “I look at it and see 43 games and 8 goals, but I knew there was more in the tank. I have to do it more consistently. For a lot of last season even know I had come back from a long injury my main goal was to stay fit. I want to do more, I want to play better.”
